amendment.description: An amendment numbered 28 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to strike section 10205 (relating to uniformity of pesticide labeling), section 10206 (relating to authority of States), and section 10207 (relating to lawful use of authorized pesticides).

vote.text: On agreeing to the Luna amendment (A018) Agreed to by recorded vote: 280 - 142 (Roll no. 148).

action.text: Roll call votes on amendments in House
House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Luna amendment (A018) Agreed to by recorded vote: 280 - 142 (Roll no. 148).
